_comment: TEMPLATE — NOT loadable. `template: true` makes validateMatteOnnxManifest reject this manifest so the EXPERIMENTAL ORT/ONNX matte backend stays disabled and the deployed LiteRT MediaPipe Selfie default is unaffected. Even with the __MATTE_ONNX_SPIKE__ build flag on, this template keeps the ONNX backend dark. To enable: remove `template`, set a real license-verified `model.url` on an allowlisted host (same-origin /_model/{hf,gh,gcs}/… proxy or a Cloudflare R2 bucket), fill `model.sizeBytes` + `model.checksum` (sha256) from the vendored ONNX file, and set the real `io` contract (input/output names, layout, inputRange, and the alpha output shape/range) for a MODNet-class ONNX model that passes the full-WebGPU operator-support gate. GPL-family weights (e.g. RVM) are rejected. See README.md and docs/ML-RUNTIME.md.
